body:
## Rationale
Lick pages are MetalForge's highest-performing GA4 content type: Igor Cavalera's existing lick pages rank **#4 and #5 in GA4 top pages** (9 and 7 page views last 7d). This batch adds the three highest-signal remaining drummers absent from batches 1-12:

| Drummer | Signal | SoundLike guide? | In lick batches 1-12? |
|---|---|---|---|
| Igor Cavalera | #1 GA4 entity, pos 3.6 GSC 'igor cavalera drum kit' | ✅ | ❌ |
| Matt Greiner | **26.67% GSC CTR** (highest ever recorded) | ✅ | ❌ |
| Charlie Benante | active Anthrax content pipeline, soundLike guide exists | ✅ | ❌ |

Proven format — batches 1-12 all shipped and GA4-confirmed.

## Data shape (9 pages × 3 licks each)

### Igor Cavalera (3 licks)
- `igor-cavalera-beneath-the-remains-double-bass` — iconic 'Beneath the Remains' stampede double bass pattern
- `igor-cavalera-chaos-ad-groove` — syncopated groove with tribal influences
- `igor-cavalera-schizophrenia-blast-groove` — early raw blast groove (ties to #2669 Schizophrenia article)

### Matt Greiner (3 licks)
- `matt-greiner-constellations-blast-groove` — technical metalcore blast from Constellations (ties to #2708 broken ref fix)
- `matt-greiner-leveler-polyrhythm` — 5-over-4 polyrhythm from Leveler
- `matt-greiner-messengers-intro-groove` — Messengers debut signature groove

### Charlie Benante (3 licks)
- `charlie-benante-among-the-living-thrash-groove` — quintessential 80s thrash groove
- `charlie-benante-persistence-of-time-blast` — faster era blast beat approach
- `charlie-benante-euphoria-groove` — State of Euphoria era mid-tempo groove

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/lickData.js` (or equivalent lick data module) — add 9 new lick objects
- `/llms/articles/igor-cavalera-licks.md` (create or append)
- `/llms/articles/matt-greiner-licks.md` (create or append)
- `/llms/articles/charlie-benante-licks.md` (create or append)
- URL pattern: `/drummers/[drummer-slug]/licks/[lick-slug]`
- Sitemap: auto-generates via dynamic route

## Quality gate (per page)
- [ ] Lick title, description ≥150 words
- [ ] Notation or tab representation of the pattern
- [ ] Internal links to drummer profile + relevant album article
- [ ] Links to soundLike guide (how-to-sound-like-[drummer])
- [ ] JSON-LD: MusicComposition or similar schema

## Estimated uplift
- Igor lick pages already proven: 16 page views / 7d from 2 existing licks (#4 and #5 GA4 pages)
- Matt Greiner 26.67% CTR is the highest signal — any lick content will capture his query cluster
- 9 new pages ≈ +9 indexable URLs; estimated +20-30 page views/wk (based on Igor lick pattern)

## Done
- 9 lick objects added to lick data module
- 3 LLM companion files created
- Sitemap auto-generates
title: SEO batch: Lick pages batch 13 — Igor Cavalera + Matt Greiner + Charlie Benante (~9 lick pages + 3 LLM files)
